results.title: How Vietnam went from post-War poverty to fast-growing powerhouse
results.description: We witnessed the end of U.S. involvement in the Vietnam War 50 years ago, on April 30, 1975, with our last helicopter out of Saigon. But Vietnam’s despair runs deeper than the war we witnessed. The nation had been under attack for 35 years – first by the Japanese, then the French, then ...

results.title: Deadly Philippines earthquake found to have raised seabed by up to 2 metres
results.description: A powerful earthquake that killed at least 61 people in the Philippines this week raised the seabed by as much as 2 metres (6.6 feet), exposing coral and harming marine life, the environment department said on Sunday. At least 40 people are still missing after the 7.8-magnitude tremor in southern Mindanao island on Monday, according [...] The post Deadly Philippines earthquake found to have raised seabed by up to 2 metres appeared first on NYT News Today .

results.title: June 12: Abiola was not Poisoned – Abdulsalami Abubakar Opens Up
results.description: Former Military Head of State, General Abdulsalami Abubakar, has dismissed long-standing claims that the presumed winner of the June 12, 1993 presidential election, Chief Moshood Kashimawo Olawale Abiola, was poisoned in detention. Abdulsalami made the clarification in his autobiography, Call of Duty, one of three books publicly presented in Abuja as part of events marking ... The post June 12: Abiola was not Poisoned – Abdulsalami Abubakar Opens Up appeared first on Politics Nigeria .
